parents.subject: LU-19576 osd: release stats after procfs entries

commit.subject: LU-19644 tests: fix blocks math in sanity/150ib
commit.message:
LU-19644 tests: fix blocks math in sanity/150ib

LU-18562 enabled extents on ldiskfs filesystems, this broke
blocks calculation of metadata overhead.

Test-Parameters:  env=ONLY=sanity,SANITY_ONLY=150 testlist=sanity-dom
Test-Parameters:  env=ONLY=sanity,SANITY_ONLY=150 testlist=sanity-dom

Fixes: 1f3e4df2fb ("LU-18562 osd: llog write batch block allocation")

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9b280de6634e6633cfc407182e96c95a91c520aa
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62762
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
